list.name: Changes
list.comment: Add initial project configuration files for legal assistant integration

task.summary: Default task
(WIP) * Implemented the graph init using the scraped information * RAG v1
First experiment with RAG
ASKE approach implementation v1
- ASKE implementation updated - First consistent version of GraphRAG with topic filtering
- Added another result
Refactor GraphEnrichedRetriever and enhance topic extraction logic
Add initial project configuration files and update RAG and ASKE pipelines
General refactor of the packages and the logic to reorganize the codebase
Refactor EUR-Lex document handling to use Playwright for downloading documents and improve logging throughout the codebase
Refactor document fetching to use BrowserFetcher for improved web scraping and error handling
text preprocessor
RAG enhancement (WIP)
Enhance ASKE pipeline with JSON output and update seed definitions for improved legal topic classification
Refactor of ASKE process
Added BM25 on paragraph extracted by topic filtering
Add RagasEvaluator class and implement PDF fetching for case law processing
Ragas implementation
Draft: GraphRAG approach to generate case law
refactor of useless doc
Improved doc_parser + case law insert
Improved parsing + claims evaluation implemented for the first benchmark
Implemented a new RAG approach + query + improved parsing of paragraphs
rag alternative model
rag alternative model
Enhance RAG integration with new query capabilities and improved logging
Nuovo retrieval (con performance okay)
Refine HybridRetriever to filter recitals by score threshold and enhance candidate selection
Add HyDE prompt and generator for act-grounded legal passage generation
Refactor RAG pipeline to use shared context for resources and simplify initialization
Implement RAG method framework with shared resources and attribution logic
Add command-line interface for RAGAS evaluation and refactor RAGPipeline initialization
Refactor case law parser to remove logging dependencies and add structure logging for document parsing
Refactor chat engine initialization and update evaluation metrics for factual accuracy
Add act score threshold configuration and enhance query classification output
Add act score threshold configuration and enhance query classification output
Add embedding model configuration and enhance query decomposition support
Rename chat page to evaluation and update functionality to compare RAG answers with Ground Truth
Enhance answer rendering with attributed segments and improve source citation handling
Enhance document handling by adding decoration functions for articles and recitals
Add acts module for EU legislation handling and source attribution enhancement
Add project configuration files for legal assistant integration
Add CSV editor configuration and legal assistant module setup
Refactor case law parser to fetch CJEU judgments from EUR-Lex by CELEX id and read hierarchy from XHTML markup
Refactor case law integration by updating imports, enhancing graph query capabilities, and implementing case law citation extraction
Rename dataset files and enhance prompt registry to support specific version retrieval for A/B testing
Add initial project configuration files for legal assistant integration

MESSAGE.value: Improved doc_parser + case law insert
Improved parsing + claims evaluation implemented for the first benchmark
Implemented a new RAG approach + query + improved parsing of paragraphs
rag alternative model
Enhance RAG integration with new query capabilities and improved logging
Nuovo retrieval (con performance okay)
Refine HybridRetriever to filter recitals by score threshold and enhance candidate selection
Add HyDE prompt and generator for act-grounded legal passage generation
Refactor RAG pipeline to use shared context for resources and simplify initialization
Implement RAG method framework with shared resources and attribution logic
Add command-line interface for RAGAS evaluation and refactor RAGPipeline initialization
Refactor case law parser to remove logging dependencies and add structure logging for document parsing
Refactor chat engine initialization and update evaluation metrics for factual accuracy
Add act score threshold configuration and enhance query classification output
Add embedding model configuration and enhance query decomposition support
Rename chat page to evaluation and update functionality to compare RAG answers with Ground Truth
Enhance answer rendering with attributed segments and improve source citation handling
Enhance document handling by adding decoration functions for articles and recitals
Add acts module for EU legislation handling and source attribution enhancement
Add project configuration files for legal assistant integration
Add CSV editor configuration and legal assistant module setup
Refactor case law parser to fetch CJEU judgments from EUR-Lex by CELEX id and read hierarchy from XHTML markup
Refactor case law integration by updating imports, enhancing graph query capabilities, and implementing case law citation extraction
Rename dataset files and enhance prompt registry to support specific version retrieval for A/B testing
Add initial project configuration files for legal assistant integration

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add initial project configuration files for legal assistant integration
